title: chrysanthemum inodorum
intro: Chrysanthemum inodorum, also known as the Japanese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum inodorum are thought to include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and promoting relaxation. Chrysanthemum inodorum is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used in traditional Chinese medicine.
